items.summary: Redesign frontend/src/pages/ProcessingScreen.tsx layout to match the reference design (image-7.png): place the app logo/brand mark above the 'Analisando Gráfico' heading, followed by a subtitle line ('Detectando padrões de velas localmente...'). All four processing stages (Carregando imagem, Processando dados, Detectando padrões de candle, Gerando resultado) must be displayed in a card list below. Each stage row shows a circular status icon on the left (pending = dim circle, active = spinning ring, complete = filled green checkmark) and the stage label text on the right. Completed stages show the icon and label in green. The active stage shows the spinning ring with white/bold label. At the bottom of the screen display a small footer line reading 'Análise local — sem envio de dados externos'. Remove any horizontal colored progress bars from the stage rows.

Replace the stage icon/status indicators in ProcessingScreen.tsx with animated horizontal loading bars styled in black and white. Each bar must animate from 0% to 100% fill while that stage is active. Display a small percentage counter (e.g., '47%') in a small font beside the right end of each bar, updating as the bar fills. The bars must use a black base track with a white fill that has a glowing/shining brightness effect (e.g., CSS box-shadow or filter: brightness glow on the white fill). Inactive/pending bars are shown as dim dark tracks with no fill. Completed bars remain fully filled in white.

Update frontend/src/pages/AnalyzeChart.tsx to simplify the upload interface and ensure it accepts any image input method without restrictions. The page must support: file picker (any image type including screenshots and copies), camera capture, clipboard paste (Ctrl+V / mobile screenshot paste), and drag-and-drop. Remove any file format rejection logic that would block common screenshot formats. Accept PNG, JPG, JPEG, WebP, and any other common image MIME type. The UI must be clean and minimal with Portuguese labels. Do not display complex upload instructions — show a single prominent upload area with a brief label.

Update frontend/src/pages/Results.tsx to display the uploaded chart image as a minimized thumbnail. The thumbnail must be small (approximately 80×60px), positioned in a corner of the results layout (top-right or bottom-right), and must not dominate the results view. Retrieve the image data URL from sessionStorage using the 'chartImage' key. Style the thumbnail with a subtle border and rounded corners consistent with the active dark/light theme.

Apply a professional, premium visual polish to the ProcessingScreen. Use a fully dark background (#000 or near-black), large bold typography for the 'Analisando Gráfico' heading, and ensure spacing, padding, and layout proportions give the screen a high-quality trading app appearance. The stage card should have a slightly elevated dark surface (e.g., dark gray card on black background). All text must remain in Portuguese (Brazil).
